name: rfs-skills
description: Agent skill stack for submitting to The Review of Financial Studies (RFS), one of the top-3 finance journals, published by Oxford University Press for the Society for Financial Studies. Covers RFS-style novelty-plus-rigor topic selection, literature positioning, causal identification, empirical and structural design, robustness and multiple-testing discipline, exhibits, journal-hosted Internet Appendix, house style, ScholarOne submission, referee strategy, and multi-round rebuttals. Bilingual en / zh-CN docs; Stata / R / Python references.
